# 测试举证模板

```md
---
title: <证据标题>
status: draft
owner: qa
last_updated: YYYY-MM-DD
summary: <一句话说明证据内容>
---

# <证据标题>

## 执行元数据

- Date:
- Operator:
- Scope:
- Environment:

## 证据内容

- Run ID:
- Command(s):
- Artifact location(s):
- Key observed result:

## 追溯关系

- Test report:
- Related change:
```
